metadata.name: alien plasma warp rotation studies 03
metadata.author: flexi
metadata.source: flexi - alien plasma warp rotation studies 03.milk

perPixelCode: // have a nice warp effect? - rotate it like a shape!
x = cos(-angle)*X1 -sin(-angle)*Y1; // rotate the x/y pane
dx = v*(cos((-x+y)*n+t) + sin((x+y)*n+t)); // these are the 2 lines for my mushroom-movement ;-)
dy = v*(cos((x-y)*n-t) + sin((-x-y)*n-t)); // insert here your dx/dy-code-to-rotate (but remember the shifting: center is @ 0,0)
dx1 = cos(angle)*dx - sin(angle)*dy; // and finally the dx/dy pane is rotated to match the x/y pane
